title: Silk Route Home Classic Granite Pestle & Mortar
features: GRANITE FINISH: Silk Route Home’s Granite Pestle & Mortar has a sleek granite finish with gradiented textures and is a great gift for anyone with a passion for cooking!
DURABILITY: Its robust nature means it is able to withstand heavy and frequent use, and is ideal for crushing most things, from garlic to herbs and spices, making it long lasting.

EASY TO USE: The narrower end of pestle provides a comfortable and easy grip when grinding and is overall easy to clean with warm soapy water. It should be noted that abrasive cleaners should not be used.
FOODIE GIFT: A thoughtful and practical gift for home cooks, aspiring chefs, or anyone who loves to experiment in the kitchen.

VERSATILE: Ideal for preparing a variety of ingredients, from spice blends and pastes to marinades and dressings, this pestle and mortar enhances flavour extraction, bringing out the best in your dishes.
description: Product Description Why Choose Silk Route's Pestle & Mortars 1. Top Quality This kitchen companion not only adds a touch of sophistication to your cooking space but also empowers you to craft exceptional and flavourful meals. 2. Durable Perfect for grinding spices, herbs, nuts, and more, with a robust design that withstands heavy, frequent use, making it ideal for everything! 3. Easy To Use Our Pestle & Mortars are designed for ease of use, featuring a comfortable grip for effortless grinding and easy cleaning with warm, soapy water. 4. Cleaning Rinse with water or remove leftover powder before washing with warm water and some soap then dry. Please wash before first use.
